name: CurrencyCloud
description: CurrencyCloud — FX and cross-border payment API platform for fintechs with multi-currency accounts and SWIFT/SEPA/local rail support.

seo.title: CurrencyCloud — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: CurrencyCloud: CurrencyCloud — FX and cross-border payment API platform for fintechs with multi-currency accounts and SWIFT/SEPA/local rail support.

when_to_use: Multi-currency account and FX API for fintech and e-money platforms
SEPA, SWIFT, and local rail payouts via single cross-border API
FX conversion and hedging for B2B payment platforms
Embedded cross-border payment infrastructure for expense management apps

review.verdict: Mature FX-as-a-service for fintechs that need embedded multi-currency — serious but enterprise-paced.
review.best_for: Fintechs and platforms embedding FX and multi-currency accounts
review.not_for: Consumer merchants or fast-moving startups wanting instant onboarding
